_comment: ArchAI MCP Server config for Cursor IDE and Claude Desktop
_instructions: 1. Copy this file to: %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json  (for Claude Desktop)
OR add the 'archai' block to your existing Cursor MCP settings
2. Replace <YOUR_BACKEND_PATH> with the absolute path to your backend folder
3. Replace <YOUR_VENV_PYTHON> with the path to your virtual environment Python
5. Test by asking: 'List all ArchAI tools available'
